## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Rapyd and GrowthX to discuss content production, performance tracking, and operational updates.](https://fathom.video/share/MN24KJqWhMFY8HUp_PBk3sW52BtthWfw?tab=summary&timestamp=30.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [6 articles published so far; 5 more ready for review; ramping up to 7 articles/week](https://fathom.video/share/MN24KJqWhMFY8HUp_PBk3sW52BtthWfw?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)
  - [GA4 tracking issue discovered for April; needs investigation and fixing](https://fathom.video/share/MN24KJqWhMFY8HUp_PBk3sW52BtthWfw?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [Exploring WPML plugin for automated content uploads to reduce manual work](https://fathom.video/share/MN24KJqWhMFY8HUp_PBk3sW52BtthWfw?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [Adjustments needed for blog post images to better align with Rapyd's brand](https://fathom.video/share/MN24KJqWhMFY8HUp_PBk3sW52BtthWfw?tab=summary&timestamp=243.0)

## Topics

### Content Production and Review

  - [6 articles published; 5 more ready for review](https://fathom.video/share/MN24KJqWhMFY8HUp_PBk3sW52BtthWfw?tab=summary&timestamp=258.0)
  - [Ramping up to 7 articles/week for next batch](https://fathom.video/share/MN24KJqWhMFY8HUp_PBk3sW52BtthWfw?tab=summary&timestamp=270.0)
  - [Next week's content tailored to recently shared documents](https://fathom.video/share/MN24KJqWhMFY8HUp_PBk3sW52BtthWfw?tab=summary&timestamp=294.0)
  - [CTA incorporation: Will customize provided CTAs to fit each article's topic](https://fathom.video/share/MN24KJqWhMFY8HUp_PBk3sW52BtthWfw?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)

### Performance Tracking

  - [GA4 issue: Dramatic drop in April traffic (from 33,596 users in March to 7 in April)](https://fathom.video/share/MN24KJqWhMFY8HUp_PBk3sW52BtthWfw?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [Mark to investigate and fix GA4 tracking problem](https://fathom.video/share/MN24KJqWhMFY8HUp_PBk3sW52BtthWfw?tab=summary&timestamp=643.0)
  - [Rapyd to track "first page blog then converted" metric, from initial visit to closed deals](https://fathom.video/share/MN24KJqWhMFY8HUp_PBk3sW52BtthWfw?tab=summary&timestamp=1065.0)
  - [Consider tracking both first-touch and last-touch attribution for blog conversions](https://fathom.video/share/MN24KJqWhMFY8HUp_PBk3sW52BtthWfw?tab=summary&timestamp=1121.0)

### Content Upload Automation

  - [Exploring WPML plugin for automated uploads using CSV files](https://fathom.video/share/MN24KJqWhMFY8HUp_PBk3sW52BtthWfw?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
  - [Potential API integration to simplify the process](https://fathom.video/share/MN24KJqWhMFY8HUp_PBk3sW52BtthWfw?tab=summary&timestamp=972.0)
  - [Mark to discuss further with IT teams from both sides](https://fathom.video/share/MN24KJqWhMFY8HUp_PBk3sW52BtthWfw?tab=summary&timestamp=997.0)

### Blog Image Improvements

  - [Current process pulls stock photos from Unsplash or similar sites](https://fathom.video/share/MN24KJqWhMFY8HUp_PBk3sW52BtthWfw?tab=summary&timestamp=1405.0)
  - [Rapyd prefers lifestyle imagery representing their customers (e.g., business people with a cool, quirky twist)](https://fathom.video/share/MN24KJqWhMFY8HUp_PBk3sW52BtthWfw?tab=summary&timestamp=1495.0)
  - [GrowthX to adjust image selection process to better align with Rapyd's brand](https://fathom.video/share/MN24KJqWhMFY8HUp_PBk3sW52BtthWfw?tab=summary&timestamp=1570.0)

### Blog Pruning and URL Structure

  - [Jacob shared a spreadsheet for blog pruning (via Slack)](https://fathom.video/share/MN24KJqWhMFY8HUp_PBk3sW52BtthWfw?tab=summary&timestamp=1607.0)
  - [Initial review needed to identify irrelevant or low-performing content](https://fathom.video/share/MN24KJqWhMFY8HUp_PBk3sW52BtthWfw?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)
  - ['/insights' URL structure performing poorly compared to '/blog' - advised to keep all content under '/blog' for better SEO performance](https://fathom.video/share/MN24KJqWhMFY8HUp_PBk3sW52BtthWfw?tab=summary&timestamp=1752.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Mark: Fix GA4 tracking issue](https://fathom.video/share/MN24KJqWhMFY8HUp_PBk3sW52BtthWfw?tab=summary&timestamp=643.0)
  - [GrowthX: Incorporate customized CTAs into blog posts](https://fathom.video/share/MN24KJqWhMFY8HUp_PBk3sW52BtthWfw?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
  - [Mark: Add Nicolette to recurring meeting and share Airtable access](https://fathom.video/share/MN24KJqWhMFY8HUp_PBk3sW52BtthWfw?tab=summary&timestamp=880.0)
  - [Mark & GrowthX IT: Further discuss automation of content uploads](https://fathom.video/share/MN24KJqWhMFY8HUp_PBk3sW52BtthWfw?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
  - [Aida: Consult with Daniel about adjusting image selection process](https://fathom.video/share/MN24KJqWhMFY8HUp_PBk3sW52BtthWfw?tab=summary&timestamp=1570.0)
  - [Mark: Review blog pruning spreadsheet and provide initial feedback](https://fathom.video/share/MN24KJqWhMFY8HUp_PBk3sW52BtthWfw?tab=summary&timestamp=1662.0)
  - [Mark & Nicolette: Begin reviewing ready articles for publication](https://fathom.video/share/MN24KJqWhMFY8HUp_PBk3sW52BtthWfw?tab=summary&timestamp=1776.0)
